title: Add embeddable iframe to the site

requirements.text: Add an iframe field to the backend CMS: add a stable text variable `iframeSrc` (initialized to an empty string `""`) in backend/main.mo. Include `iframeSrc` in the record returned by `getContent()`. Add an admin-only update method `updateIframeSrc(src: Text)` that verifies the caller equals the hardcoded admin principal before persisting the new value, and rejects with `#err("Access denied")` otherwise.
acceptanceCriteria: `iframeSrc` stable variable is declared and initialized to `""` in main.mo
`updateIframeSrc(src: Text)` rejects callers other than the hardcoded admin with `#err("Access denied")`
`updateIframeSrc` persists the new value in stable storage and it survives canister upgrades

requirements.text: Add an Iframe URL field to the Admin Dashboard (/admin) CMS panel. It must be a text input pre-populated with the current `iframeSrc` value from `getContent()`, with a Save button that calls `updateIframeSrc()` and then invalidates/refetches the content query. Add the corresponding `useUpdateIframeSrc` mutation to `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard has a clearly labeled 'Iframe URL' text input field
The input is pre-populated with the current `iframeSrc` from `getContent()`
A Save button triggers `updateIframeSrc()` with the input value
After a successful save, the content query is invalidated and refetched

requirements.text: On the Press Kit page (/press-kit), render an `<iframe>` using the `iframeSrc` value from the global content query. The iframe must only be rendered when `iframeSrc` is a non-empty string. It must be displayed as a distinct section between the Video Section and the About the Game section. The iframe must be fully responsive (100% width, with a fixed aspect ratio such as 16:9), have no visible border, and respect the page's light/dark theme styling.
acceptanceCriteria: The iframe section is not rendered when `iframeSrc` is empty
The iframe is rendered between the Video Section and the About the Game section when `iframeSrc` is non-empty
The iframe is 100% width and maintains a 16:9 aspect ratio on all screen sizes
The iframe has no visible border
The iframe src is driven by the `iframeSrc` value from the content query

constraints: Do not change the hardcoded admin principal `r423e-lboyg-thldn-64zao-ew2h3-bh3v6-uouit-khwus-vkwn2-afrmu-rqe`
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file
nonGoals: Changing the iframe URL from the public press kit page (admin-only edit)
Adding the iframe to the landing page (/)
Adding the iframe to the admin dashboard itself
